title: Adicea dauciodora
taxonomy: Adicea dauciodora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family. It is native to Madagascar, a country located off the coast of East Africa. This plant has a complex classification, belonging to the genus Adicea and is a member of the family Rubiaceae. Adicea dauciodora is a part of the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification includes the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta.
